description: Transform the plain text article in 'Alumni_Feature.docx' into a professional magazine layout. Format the body text into two columns while keeping the title 'BUILDING THE FUTURE' centered across the full page width. Place a text box in the center of the page containing the quote "The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today." with centered italic text, a white fill, and a double-line or thick border. Ensure the body text flows around the text box using square or tight wrapping. Save the final document as 'Alumni_Feature_Formatted.docx' in the Documents folder.

metadata.required_quote: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today
